Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 5
Recent Green phase: Replaced length-based hack with full Conway's rules using sparse neighbor-counting (string-keyed Map of neighbor counts; cells survive at count 2 if alive, born at count 3).

Refactor the implementation while keeping all tests green. Run tests with `pnpm test`.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return when done.

content.text: I'll analyze the implementation file and refactor it while keeping all tests green.
